paper.title: Mortars with nano-SiO2 and micro-SiO2 investigated by experimental design
paper.authors: Luciano Senff; Dachamir Hotza; Wellington L. Repette; Victor M. Ferreira; Joao A. Labrincha
paper.material_system: cement mortar with nanosilica and silica fume
paper.notes: Compressive strength reported as response surface figure without exact numeric table values in packet.

figures.caption: Fig. 4. Compressive strength of mortars with SF and nS after 28 days.
figures.notes: Values are plotted in a response-surface figure; packet does not provide exact point values.

evidence.evidence_text: Compressive strength values analyzed by factorial design; levels SF 0,10,20% or nS 0,3.5,7% and W/B 0.35,0.47,0.59; surfaces illustrated in Fig. 4.
evidence.supports: mixture design and figure-only compressive-strength results

review_queue.question: Digitize Fig. 4 response surfaces if mixture-level 28-day compressive strengths are required.
review_queue.suggested_action: Use original figure image/plot data to digitize values; do not direct-insert from packet text.

main_risks: Compressive-strength values are figure-only in the packet.
